10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Effective coach planning hub with good triage UX

topIssues.issue: Groups tab shows placeholder alert('Kommer snart')

topIssues.impact: Inefficient for coaches with many players

topIssues.issue: Stats cards don't show trend (is coverage improving?)

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Implement group planning + add bulk plan creation + add trend indicators to stats

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader + PageContainer pattern. Similar stats-first hub design to CoachSpillereHub. Integrates with coachesAPI.getAthletes for real data.
